basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Fellow / Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 4 Project Fellow / Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 30-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or M.Tech. in Mechanical/Civil/Hydropower Engineering or related disciplines with specific experience in CFD, design, fabrication, testing of turbines/pumps.
qualification.details: Project Fellow / Research Associate (for Development of CFD guidelines): Ph.D. in Mechanical/Civil/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design-based work in hydro turbine/ Pump OR M Tech in Mechanical/Civil/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3-year experience in CFD/ design of hydro turbine / pump. Project Fellow / Research Associate (screw low head turbine / other low head turbine): Ph.D. Or M. Tech. in Mechanical/Hydropower/Aeronautical / Civil Engineering or relevant discipline having Design including solid work and CFD based work of hydraulic turbine / rotating machine / aerodynamics. Project Fellow / Research Associate (for Hydro Kinetic turbine development): Ph.D. in Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design or fabrication of proto type hydro turbine / Pump OR related areas OR M Tech in Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3 years' experience in CFD/ design or fabrication of proto type hydro turbine/pump OR related areas. Project Fellow / Research Associate (for mechanical design of model and prototype turbine): Ph.D. in Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Tribology/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design-based work preferably with solid work / testing in hydro turbine / Pump OR related areas OR M Tech in Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Civil/ Tribology/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3 years' experience in CFD/design preferably with solid work / testing of hydro turbine/pump OR related areas.

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Fellow: Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 1,00,000/- + HRA per month; Research Associate: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- + HRA per month
salary_details.project fellow: Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 1,00,000/- + HRA per month
salary_details.research associate: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- + HRA per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:iitr.ac.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Fellow / Research Associate (for Development of CFD guidelines): Ph.D. in Mechanical/Civil/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design-based work in hydro turbine/ Pump OR M Tech in Mechanical/Civil/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3-year experience in CFD/ design of hydro turbine / pump. Project Fellow / Research Associate (screw low head turbine / other low head turbine): Ph.D. Or M. Tech. in Mechanical/Hydropower/Aeronautical / Civil Engineering or relevant discipline having Design including solid work and CFD based work of hydraulic turbine / rotating machine / aerodynamics. Project Fellow / Research Associate (for Hydro Kinetic turbine development): Ph.D. in Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design or fabrication of proto type hydro turbine / Pump OR related areas OR M Tech in Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3 years' experience in CFD/ design or fabrication of proto type hydro turbine/pump OR related areas. Project Fellow / Research Associate (for mechanical design of model and prototype turbine): Ph.D. in Mechanical/Mechatronics/Civil/ Tribology/ Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline having CFD/design-based work preferably with solid work / testing in hydro turbine / Pump OR related areas OR M Tech in Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Civil/ Tribology/Hydropower Engineering or relevant discipline with 3 years' experience in CFD/design preferably with solid work / testing of hydro turbine/pump OR related areas.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:iitr.ac.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Fellow / Research Associate posts at IIT Roorkee is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Fellow / Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Project Fellow / Research Associate positions at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Ph.D. or M.Tech. in relevant engineering disciplines, with specific experience in areas like CFD, design, fabrication, and testing of turbines/pumps.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Fellow and Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: For Project Fellow, the salary ranges from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 1,00,000/- + HRA per month. For Research Associate, it ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is HRED/R-298.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is project-based.
